title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Angel One in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
